message:
chore(gitignore): ignore macOS AppleDouble files and stray images

Add three patterns to prevent accidental commits:
- ._* : macOS AppleDouble/resource fork metadata files created on
  non-HFS+ filesystems
- /*.jpeg, /*.jpg, /*.png : stray image downloads occasionally
  dropped in the repo root directory by mistake

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,12 @@ Cargo.lock
 *.swo
 *~
 .DS_Store
+._*
+
+# Stray image files at repo root (downloads dropped in wrong dir)
+/*.jpeg
+/*.jpg
+/*.png
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
